items.title: useReducer: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this React: Component-Based Browser Applications misconception? A reducer should fetch data directly when processing a load action.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Reducers stay pure; perform effects outside and dispatch actions representing their results.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Reducers stay pure; perform effects outside and dispatch actions representing their results.
